_README: Wave 2 RETRIEVAL-RECALL baseline eval cases for scripts/wave2-eval.mjs.
Each case is a real question whose answer was VERIFIED to live on a specific
(document, page) in the canonical retrieval layer (canonical_document_chunks).
The harness embeds the question, runs the live search_canonical_documents RPC,
and checks whether the gold page appears in the top-K results.
This measures retrieval RECALL — the exact thing Wave 2 (contextual retrieval)
is designed to improve. Run it before Wave 2 for a baseline, and again after,
to get a provable before/after number.
Cases authored 2026-05-18 from verified corpus content.
Fields: id, question, gold_document_ids[], gold_pages[], fact (the verified
answer that lives on the gold page), doc_type.

cases.question: On N757VB's propeller, how often does recurring airworthiness directive AD 2010-04-05 have to be repeated?
cases.fact: Recurring AD 2010-04-05 due every 750 hours

cases.question: Which airworthiness directive covered the inspection of the pilot and copilot seat rails on N757VB?
cases.fact: C/W AD 2011-10-09 by visual inspection of pilot and copilot seat rails

cases.question: What is the part number of the alternator solenoid that was replaced on N562AF?
cases.fact: Remove and replace alternator solenoid p/n X61-0029

cases.question: What is the part number of the beacon light bulb replaced on N562AF in 2023?
cases.fact: Replaced beacon light bulb p/n 5043301

cases.question: What were the four cylinder compression readings on N757VB's engine in the May 2016 maintenance entry?
cases.fact: Compression test CYL#1 79/80, CYL#2 79/80, CYL#3 76/80, CYL#4 78/80

cases.question: Why would N80587 not start in the April 2012 airframe logbook entry?
cases.fact: Would not start; removed bottom spark plugs, found full of lead

cases.question: What was the engine time since major overhaul (TSMOH) on N757VB in the February 2023 entry?
What new spark plug part number was installed on N757VB's engine cylinders 1 and 2?
cases.fact: Replaced spark plugs with new P/N UREM37BY on No1 and No2 cylinders

cases.question: What make and model of propeller is installed on N89114?
cases.fact: Sensenich 72CKS6-0-54 propeller, S/N K5656

cases.question: When was the ELT battery next due on N562AF after the February 2015 inspection?
cases.fact: ELT battery next due June 2015

cases.question: What was the total airframe time on N562AF at the October 2018 annual inspection?
cases.fact: N562AF Total Time 5791.3 on 10/24/2018

cases.question: What is the serial number of the propeller installed on N757VB?
cases.fact: Propeller model 1A103, serial number BG084

cases.question: What aircraft type and serial number are recorded for N757VB in its airframe logbook?
cases.fact: C152, serial number 15280028

cases.question: How many quarts of oil should the Cessna engine sump be filled to for normal flights of less than 3 hours?
cases.fact: Fill to 7 quart level for normal flights less than 3 hours; sump capacity 8 quarts

cases.question: What is the total fuel capacity of the Cessna in the pilot operating handbook?
cases.fact: Fuel capacity total 39 gallons; engine 145 rated HP at 2700 RPM

cases.question: What is the maximum nosewheel turn limit when using the tow-bar on the Cessna?
cases.fact: When using the tow-bar never exceed the turning limit of 30 degrees either side of center

cases.question: How many portable electronic devices can the Garmin GPS 175 / GNX 375 pair with over Bluetooth?
cases.fact: Supports Bluetooth pairing with up to 13 portable electronic devices

cases.question: When must FDE prediction be used with the Garmin GPS 175 as a primary means of navigation?
cases.fact: Under FAR parts 91, 121, 125, 135 FDE must be used prior to all oceanic or remote area flights

cases.question: What conditions trigger a TERRAIN caution alert on the Garmin GPS 175?
cases.fact: Reduced required terrain clearance, imminent terrain impact, premature descent

cases.question: On the Garmin GPS 175 map, which feature is drawn at the highest priority over all others?
cases.fact: Map drawing priority level 1 is Traffic, level 2 Ownship
